cases.prompt: このPRの説明文を日本語で書いて
expected_decisions: PR body uses ordinary Markdown paragraphs, not one-sentence-per-line
Argument rigor, redundancy removal, and no-LLM-phrasing rules still apply
cases.notes: requesting-code-review may legitimately co-trigger for a review request package; only the unrelated performance-review skill is asserted absent.

cases.prompt: plans/ 配下の日本語の設計文書を推敲して
expected_decisions: One-sentence-per-line formatting applies to plans/ Markdown docs
Argument rigor and LLM-ish phrasing checks are prioritized on a revision pass
cases.notes: Revising a Japanese doc under plans/ is a direct scope match.

cases.prompt: Write the PR description in English
expected_decisions: English-language prose is out of scope for this skill
cases.notes: The skill applies only to Japanese technical prose, not English documents.

cases.prompt: 日本語のコミットメッセージ規約を教えて
expected_decisions: Commit messages stay English by existing repository convention and are out of scope
cases.notes: Even though the prompt is in Japanese, commit-message convention is an explicit out-of-scope area.
